titleStmt.title: SII 31.51: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 51. (A.R. No. B 246 of 1936.) KUMĀRADĒVAM, NIDADAVOLU TALUK, WEST GODAVARI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar in the kalyāṇamaṇḍapa of the Venkaṭēśvarasvāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1203 Vṛisha, Pausha śu. 15. Friday, Uttarāyaṇasamkrānti, corresponding to 1281 A.D. December 26.

It registers the purchase of land from Vāsudēvabhaṭlu, the son of Bālasōmāyājulu and grandson of Suṁkāla Vāsudēva Bhaṭṭōpādhyāya by certain Mahādēvanāyaka The same is granted to the temple of Sōmanātha of Tilatīrtha while Vishṇuvardhana was ruling from Malaya, for maintaining the perpetual lamp. It further records the gift of 45 sheep probably were entrusted to certain Dēmumāre bōya, the son Kāmana bōya with the stipulation to maintain the said gift as long as the sūrya and moon exists. The witnesses for this gift were Aśēshavidvanmahājanas of Sūryanārayaṇavaram and sthānāḍhikāris etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1203
Agu vṛṣa saṁvatsara pauṣa
śuddha 15 śukravārāna Utta
rāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtti Aṁdu ma
layamaṁdu viṣṇuva¨rdhanadēva
cakrava¨rtulu rājyamu cēyaṁgānu
tilatī¨rddhamu sōmanādha śrīmahā
dēvaraku mahādēvanāyaniṁgāru A

khaṁḍa dīpasaku suṁkāla vāsudē
va bhaṭōpādhyāya sōmayājula ma
numaṁḍu bālasōmayājula koḍu
ku vāsudēva bhaṭla cētanu krayamu
goṁnaṭi guḍiveli pōlāna ciṁtala gu
ṁṭa vāyavya
Iṁtapaṭṭu go
riyalu 45 kā¨rmabōyuni
koḍuku dēmu mārebōyuṁḍu
Ācaṁ¨rda¨rkka sdhāyigānaḍupuvāṁ
ḍu . dha¨rmamunu naḍipiṁceḍi vā
ru . sū¨ryyanārāyaṇa varapu A

śēṣa vidvanmahājanāluṁnu
sdhānādhikāruluṁnu .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō
harētu vasuṁdharāṁ ṣa
ṣṭhiva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyalēkrimiḥ . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.51 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
